name: Cherry Yum Yum
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix melted butter with more than half of the graham cracker crumbs in a large, 13-inch by 9-inch Pyrex dish.
2. Press the mixture into the bottom of the dish.
3. In a separate bowl, beat dream whip and milk until combined.
4. Beat cream cheese and sugar together in another bowl.
5. Add the cream cheese mixture to the whipped butter mixture.
6. Spread half of the whip mixture over the crumbs.
7. Arrange cherries on top of the whip mixture.
8. Cover with the remaining whip mixture, then add any leftover crumbs.
9. Allow the dish to sit overnight in the refrigerator before serving. Serves 15-20.
